items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 A nice gacha turnbased tactic Card Game.
items.summary: A nice gacha turnbased tactic Card Game. The Artwork and storybuilding ist great. The Setting ist somewhat victorian cthulhuest (with lots of mythos references) but less gloomy with strewn in kawaii tendencies. You build a team of 4 charakters each with their own fix set of cards. Charakters have one of 4 realms wich can be combined, though single realm-teams offen have better synergies. There are lots of sidestories as well as events.
items.author: Christoph Wittek

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Jogo fantástico pra quem gosta do gênero
items.summary: Jogo fantástico pra quem gosta do gênero. Não é predatório nem pay to Win. A história é muito boa e não é enjoativo evoluir os personagens. da até gosto de gastar nele.
items.author: Diego Herisson
